metadata.description: Social Listening & Engagement — Safe discovery and human-approved posting across Reddit, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and Quora

plugins.name: sl-engagement
plugins.description: Social Listening & Engagement — Find relevant social media discussions across Reddit, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and Quora, draft on-brand comments, and post only after explicit user approval. Safe read-only discovery with human-in-the-loop posting.
